benefits.description: Down 10 pounds in 6 weeks, aiming for another 15 pounds

protocol_notes: Currently at week 6 of protocol at 1.5mg/week. Plans to slowly titrate up to 3mg/week and maintain for several weeks before decreasing. Protocol runs through summer ending around September 2026, followed by break through holidays, restart mid-January 2027. User is under 200 lbs and deliberately avoiding higher doses used in clinical trials. Vials stored in insulated thermos in freezer until reconstitution, then moved to refrigerator.
